funFacts: Contrary to its depiction in popular movies, there is no scientific evidence that Dilophosaurus displaying Neck Frill spit venom or possessed a neck frill.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing clean borders and line work using high-resolution colored pencils.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
